sizing_rule.note: Dynamic fractional f with asset allocation split: allocate initial percentage as active equity (recalculated daily), reserve remainder as inactive equity (constant dollar amount). Position sizing based on active equity portion only. Optimal f value not specified by author.

source_rule_text: Use dynamic fractional f technique with asset allocation: determine an initial percentage of total equity to allocate as active equity, keep remainder as constant inactive equity, and reflect only day-to-day changes in the active portion while maintaining the inactive dollar amount constant.
